org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun.HostFunBuilder

Packages that use HostFunBuilder
Package
Description
org.kink_lang.kink
The core package of the Kink vm.
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun
Interfaces used to make a host fun, which is a FunVal to perform action in Java code.

  • Uses of HostFunBuilder in org.kink_lang.kink

    Methods in org.kink_lang.kink that return HostFunBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HostFunBuilder
    FunHelper.make()
    Returns a builder of a host fun.
    HostFunBuilder
    FunHelper.make(String desc)
    Returns a builder of a host fun, with the description of the fun.

  • Uses of HostFunBuilder in org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun

    Methods in org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun that return HostFunBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HostFunBuilder
    HostFunBuilder.desc(String desc)
    Returns a new builder with the specified desc, and all the other properties inherited from this.
    HostFunBuilder
    HostFunBuilder.take(int numArgs)
    Returns a new builder with the specified number of args.
    HostFunBuilder
    HostFunBuilder.takeMin(int argsMin)
    Returns a new builder with the specified minimum number of args.
    HostFunBuilder
    HostFunBuilder.takeMinMax(int argsMin, int argsMax)
    Returns a builder with the specified minimum and the maximum number of args.
